svg.text: Do Baskets Dream — MVP breadboard wiring
One ESP32 + one 16-LED SK6812 ring, powered from USB 5V. No 12V / buck converter for this test.
ESP32 GND → − rail • Ring GND → − rail
ESP32 GPIO18 → 470Ω → Ring DIN (data, must be Data IN)
100µF cap across rails — STRIPE leg → − rail (optional, you have it)
⚠ Before plugging in USB: cap stripe leg on − rail · data wire on Ring IN (not OUT) · nothing 12V anywhere.
